selectedBinding.label: Service-level breach-risk alerts
selectedBinding.purpose: Escalate calibrated breach-risk before service SLOs are missed.

bindings.label: Service-level breach-risk alerts
bindings.purpose: Escalate calibrated breach-risk before service SLOs are missed.

bindings.label: Projection stale or quarantined alerts
bindings.purpose: Notify when published operational projections become stale or quarantined.

bindings.label: Incident creation and severity escalation
bindings.purpose: Route new incidents and severity changes to command intake.

bindings.label: Near-miss intake notifications
bindings.purpose: Bring near-miss reports into the same incident and assurance review path.

bindings.label: Reportability pending or overdue alerts
bindings.purpose: Escalate pending and overdue reportability decisions.

bindings.label: Release freeze and recovery disposition alerts
bindings.purpose: Route freeze, rollback, and recovery disposition changes into release watch.

bindings.label: Resilience posture blocked or stale alerts
bindings.purpose: Escalate blocked or stale resilience posture before exercises proceed.

bindings.label: Assurance graph blocked or stale alerts
bindings.purpose: Escalate blocked evidence graph verdicts and stale runtime bindings.

bindings.label: Evidence-gap owner notifications
bindings.purpose: Notify named owners when control evidence gaps need action.

bindings.label: Destination delivery failure fallback
bindings.purpose: Route failed destination deliveries to a safe fallback path without leaking payloads.
